inline_comments.message:
Ideally, we would not like to deal with the assignment and management of using node ports, in the future. Especially seeing as there is a limitation of having a maximum of 5 ranges in use per k8s cluster. 

The MSB project may be of interest here to help provide routing into the k8s containers from a single external address.

For now, this is a welcome evolutionary improvement over the use of a single fixed node port range.
